content.text:
Decision: pass_with_model_gate_blocked

Model evidence:
- BLOCKED_MODEL_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED. From inside this run I cannot machine-confirm that the harness is bound to `claude-opus-4-7` with max effort / adaptive thinking; the model/effort binding must be re-attested externally by the orchestrator before final acceptance.
- All other production-line counters in the packet are internally consistent: matrix 894 with 32 rows for `2026????`; 15 Q1-Q15 placement/fusion holds; ledger 82 / 12; accepted JSONL 82 / 12; DOCX-vs-PDF labels 2236/2236; PDF pages 243 with 243 rendered PNGs and 0 blank-like pages.

Source findings:
- Q1-Q15 answer-key blocker: correctly handled. Paper PDF has no useful text layer, only `page_001.png`-`page_011.png` under `preprocessed_corpus/renders/e37482eff39f3618/`, and the available rubric/detail-rule docx covers subjective items only. Carrying Q1-Q15 as 15 individual `NEED_ANSWER_KEY_BATCH12` matrix rows with no DOCX insertion is the correct conservative posture under the hard rules (ordinary reference answers cannot become scoring rules).
- Q16(2): rubric paras 13-21 are sufficient to support the retained entries (`???????????`, `???????/??????/??????????`, `??????`, `???????`, `?????/????????`, and high-level `????????/??/??`) and to add `?????` as a new registered entry.
- Q17: rubric paras 23-41 confirm Q17(1) is ?????? and Q17(2) is ????. Refusing to upgrade any value-related wording in that answer path into a standalone ?????? placement is the correct module-boundary exclusion.
- Q18(1): rubric paras 42-49 are sufficient to retain the existing `???/?????/??/????`, `?????/????????/?????????/?????`, `???/????/??`, and `????/????` registrations and to add `???????` as a new registered entry under dialectical-thinking methods.
- Q19: paras 61-68 keep this firmly inside `???????????` / `???????????????`. Module-boundary exclusion from the political/?????? line is correct.
- Q20: rubric paras 69-81 are sufficient to retain `???`, `??/????????????????`, `?????`, `?????`, and to add `????????` as a new registered entry.
- Render gate: 12 `2026 ????` hits located via spaced-title search on pages 11, 35, 48, 68, 73, 75, 96, 127, 133, 143, 153, 161 align 1:1 with the 12 ledger/accepted rows. New Q16(2) `?????` on p.68, new Q18(1) `???????` on p.153, and new Q20 `????????` on p.127 are each visually localized on their expected pages, and the compact-title PDF-text-extraction artifact (post-year inserted space) is explicitly documented, so the render gate is sound.

Required corrections:
- none

Residual blockers:
- GPTPro full-artifact external review: real_call_pending.
- Claude Opus external full-artifact review: real_call_pending.
- Model/effort binding (`claude-opus-4-7` + max/adaptive) external re-attestation: required before final acceptance.
